rationale: Multi-genre coverage exercises the V.6 fidelity rubric across mood quadrants and stem-energy distributions. Track choices are Matt's; this file is the canonical record so the reel is reproducible.

segments.label: sparse jazz
segments.rationale: Low arousal, high valence; tests silence fallback and quiet-passage fixtures (Increment 5.2). Exercises AGC behaviour on low-density material — kick-less, brush-drums or piano trio preferred.

segments.label: hard electronic
segments.rationale: High arousal, mixed valence; exercises beat-heavy fixture, tests beat-pulse amplitude clamps from Increment U.9. Sustained kick at 125–140 BPM exercises the bass AGC path and drums_beat deviation primitive.

segments.label: symphonic or wide-dynamic-range
segments.rationale: Wide dynamic range; exercises AGC ramp-up and ramp-down, dynamics-driven preset selection, and the SilenceDetector .suspect → .silent → .recovering cycle on quiet passages.

notes: Record the reel in one unedited take — do not cut between segments. Transitions are part of the artefact.
Re-recording: when V.6+ uplifts land, increment 'version' and commit a dated copy quality_reel_v2.mp4. Prior artefacts remain referenceable.
See RUNBOOK.md → 'Recording the quality reel' for the capture procedure.
